sections.heading: These Regulations may be cited as the Export Processing Zones Title
In these Regulations unless the context otherwise requires-- Interpretation
sections.text:
" Authority " means the Zambia Export Processing Zones
Authority;
"Board" means the Zambia Export Processing Zones Authority
Board;
"developer" means a person who holds a permit issued pursuant
to section seventeen of the Act;
" investor" means the holder of an export processing licence
twenty
issued pursuant to section of the Act;
" licence" means an export processing licence granted pursuant
twenty
to section of the Act; and
• "permit " means a permit granted to a developer pursuant to
section twenty of theAct.

sections.heading: (1) The Authority shall, within thirty days of receiving an !)jonMi4b1n
sections.text:
application for a pennit or licence, consider the application. of
applica!ion
(2) Where theA uthority is satisfied that the applicant has complied
with the requirements of these Regulations, the Authority shall approve
the application and may refuse to approve .the application where the
Authority is not so satisfied.
(3) The Authority shall, immediately after the expiration of the
period referred to in subregulation ( 1) inform the applicant of its
decision.
(4 ) Where the Authority refuses to gnmt a permit or licence, the
Authority shall inform the applicant accordingly giving reasons for the
refusal.
(5) The Authority shall, where an application is approved.by the
Authority issue the applicant with-
(a ) a i:,ermit in Form EPZ 3 set out in the Schedule to these
Regulations; or
(b) a licence in Form EPZ 4 set out in the Schedule to these
Regulations.
